name: Failed MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Failed MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
SIGMA Description: Detects a failed installation of a Exchange Transport Agent

False positives:
- Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%install-transportagent%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Failed MSExchange Transport Agent Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%install-transportagent%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Failed MSExchange Transport Agent Installation

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
